about.title: About Us
about.description: Tech Invent LLC was established in 2015 and operates in introducing European premium brands to the Mongolian market. We are the official distributor of Zehnder and BWT brands, supplying indoor air quality, heating systems, and water purification solutions for buildings, residential complexes, and public facilities.
